AIOpsRequest.description:
AIOps diagnosis request.

The compatibility endpoint accepts several frontend field names so older
and newer clients can both pass the real incident description.

example.goal: API latency jumped from 80ms to 800ms after 10:20.

sessionId.description: Conversation ID used to track diagnosis history.
sessionId.title: Sessionid

post.description: Stream agent run events via SSE.
Inject evidence, replace a tool call, or modify the goal of a running agent.

get.description: 查询 AIOps 运行摘要。
查询 AIOps 运行过程事件。

post.description:
快速对话接口
{
    "code": 200,
    "message": "success",
    "data": {
        "success": true,
        "answer": "回答内容",
        "errorMessage": null
    }
}

Args:
    request: 对话请求

Returns:
    统一格式的对话响应

清空会话历史

Args:
    request: 清空请求

Returns:
    操作结果

get.description:
查询会话历史

Args:
    session_id: 会话 ID

Returns:
    会话信息
查询会话工具调用事件。
列出已持久化的会话摘要。

post.description:
流式对话接口（基于 RAG Agent，SSE）

返回 SSE 格式，data 字段为 JSON：

工具调用事件:
event: message
data: {"type":"tool_call","data":{"tool":"工具名","status":"start|end","input":{...}}}

内容流式事件:
event: message
data: {"type":"content","data":"内容块"}

完成事件:
event: message
data: {"type":"done","data":{"answer":"完整答案","tool_calls":[...]}}

Args:
    request: 对话请求

Returns:
    SSE 事件流
